title: Land of Goblins
description: Land of goblins! Challenge the beliefs of these mini beings by defeating their gods
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd0190dbb66116fbd9bd2ca7f41ffa07e0bf53b2.png)

Requires: [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib), 
CurseForge: [Land of Goblins](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/land-of-goblins)

Bored of not having new challenges? Ignore mods with complicated bosses, better download Land of Goblins! 
A small, but complete mod. Meet the goblins and their striking variants! These little beings will be your new friends (enemies) in the lonely world of Minecraft! And that's all it brings? Of course not! These goblins are divided into three families, each a believer in an ancient creature that once inhabited the Minecraftian lands. 
Face the goblins, discover their secrets, face their "gods", and get their unique and powerful rewards!
